# Cascade Creatives — Jeremy Dubs
# Video Production & Website Upgrades | Bellingham, WA
# https://jeremydubs.com

## About
Jeremy Dubs is a video producer, editor, and website consultant based in Bellingham, Washington, operating as Cascade Creatives. He helps local businesses look more professional, communicate more clearly, and show up better online through polished video content and targeted website improvements. He works directly with clients — no agency overhead, no account managers.

## Services
- Commercial video production (on-location, Western WA)
- Remote video editing (nationwide, Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve)
- Social media content (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)
- Real estate and property video (drone walkthrough and cinematic)
- Drone and cinematic b-roll (FAA Part 107 licensed)
- Website upgrades for local businesses (homepage rewrites, CTA improvements, navigation fixes, trust signals, local SEO)

## Pricing
- Website site cleanup: $500-$800, 3-5 business days
- Website upgrade: $900-$1,500, 7-10 business days
- Website growth upgrade: $1,500-$2,500+, scoped per project
- Video production: Project-based pricing, contact for quote
- Free website audit available (20-30 minute review, no obligation)

## Service Areas
- On-location production: Bellingham WA, Seattle WA, Bellevue WA, Kirkland WA, Eastside WA, Western Washington
- Remote editing: Available nationwide
- Website upgrades: Available nationwide

## Credentials
- FAA Part 107 licensed drone operator
- Editing in Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve
- Operating as Cascade Creatives since 2013
- Based in Bellingham, Washington

## Key Clients
- Cascade Pest Control (ongoing video retainer — commercials, social reels, seasonal campaigns, YouTube)
- All Star Lake Spa (full website overhaul — spam removal, homepage rewrite, services restructure, mobile fix)
- NW Montessori School (60th anniversary film — archival footage, interviews, event screening)
- Marcel Dolak, Engel and Volkers (luxury real estate video — drone, walkthrough, cinematic)
- Silver Cloud Hotels, Paradise Finance (Cairns, Australia) (commercial and brand video)
